name: siyuan-hugo-publisher
description: SiYuan plugin to publish notes to Hugo with metadata mapping, image handling, auto-sync on save, and orphan-aware cleanup.

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && npx esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/index.js --format=cjs --platform=node --target=es2020 --minify --external:siyuan --external:electron --external:fs --external:path --external:crypto --external:os && cp plugin.json dist/ && cp src/README.md dist/README.md && cp src/logo.png dist/icon.png && cp src/preview.png dist/preview.png && cp -r i18n dist/
scripts.test: rm -rf .test-build && tsc -p tsconfig.json --outDir .test-build --rootDir . --module Node16 --moduleResolution node16 --declaration false --declarationMap false --sourceMap false && node --test tests/*.test.js
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
